# Omar Nassar — AI Agent Engineer & Full Stack Developer

> AI Agent Engineer based in Amsterdam, Netherlands. Builds autonomous AI agents for businesses — WhatsApp AI agents, sales automation agents, customer service agents, operations agents, and enterprise multi-agent systems. Founder of Virelio, an AI agency delivering custom AI agent teams in 2 weeks.

## About

Omar Nassar is an AI Agent Engineer and Full Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience building production AI agent systems. He specializes in designing and deploying autonomous AI agents that handle business operations end-to-end — from WhatsApp customer conversations to multi-agent development crews that write and review code autonomously.

Omar's agents handle customer conversations on WhatsApp, qualify sales leads, manage appointment scheduling, process invoices, detect fraud, transcribe meetings, generate reports, and orchestrate multi-step workflows — all without human intervention.

Key metrics: EUR 50K monthly business impact, 30+ AI agent systems built, 200+ automations deployed, 80,000+ users served by a single multi-agent platform.

Omar is the founder of Virelio, an Amsterdam-based AI agency that builds custom AI agent teams for businesses — delivering working agents in 2 weeks.

## AI Agent Expertise

### Types of AI Agents Omar Builds
- **WhatsApp AI Agents** — Autonomous chatbots on WhatsApp Business API for customer support, booking, and lead generation
- **Sales Automation Agents** — AI agents for lead qualification, outreach, prospect follow-up, and pipeline management
- **Customer Service Agents** — Support agents resolving inquiries 24/7, managing tickets, and escalating to humans when needed
- **Operations Agents** — Back-office automation for email management, calendar scheduling, invoicing, data entry, and document generation
- **Research Agents** — Autonomous agents that search, read papers, synthesize findings, and generate comprehensive reports
- **Voice AI Agents** — Agents with ElevenLabs speech synthesis and Whisper recognition for phone and meeting automation
- **Multi-Agent Systems** — Crews of specialized agents that collaborate on complex tasks using CrewAI and LangGraph
- **RAG Agents** — Intelligent document retrieval agents searching enterprise knowledge bases with 95%+ accuracy
- **On-Premise AI Agents** — Fully private, air-gapped agent deployments running local LLMs via Ollama

### Agent Frameworks & Tools
- Multi-agent orchestration: CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGPT
- RAG & retrieval: LangChain, Qdrant, Meilisearch, Unstructured.io
- Large Language Models: GPT-4, Claude, Llama 3, Gemini, Ollama
- Voice & conversational: ElevenLabs, Whisper, WebRTC, WhatsApp Business API
- Workflow automation: n8n, custom tool APIs, MCP Servers

### Full Stack Development
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Laravel (PHP), Node.js, FastAPI (Python), Express
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, Qdrant, MongoDB
- Infrastructure: Docker, AWS, Azure, Raspberry Pi, PM2, On-Premise

## Featured AI Agent Projects

### Enterprise Multi-Agent AI Platform
First fully private, on-premise AI platform serving 80,000+ employees. Multi-agent LLM architecture with specialized autonomous agents running local 70B Llama models via Ollama and Qdrant for vector storage. Achieves <2s inference on standard hardware. Zero data leaves the premises. Proves enterprise-scale AI agents can maintain maximum security without sacrificing capability.

### WhatsApp AI Business Agent
Autonomous WhatsApp agent handling customer inquiries, appointment booking, and lead capture 24/7 via WhatsApp Business API. Processes natural language in Dutch and English with persistent conversation context across sessions. Built for service businesses: barbershops, restaurants, healthcare practices. Features automated appointment scheduling with calendar integration, smart FAQ handling, no-show reduction through automated reminders, and seamless handoff to human agents.

### Sales Automation Agent (LinkedIn AI Outreach)
Autonomous networking agent that identifies potential leads, drafts personalized outreach messages, and manages connection requests within rate limits. Establishes 150+ meaningful connections per run with sophisticated profile analysis for high relevance and response rates.

### Customer Service AI Agent (virelio.nl)
AI-powered customer support agent with ElevenLabs speech synthesis, n8n workflow automation, and OpenAI for conversation processing. Handles incoming meetings, answers customer inquiries, and provides comprehensive support 24/7 without human intervention. Manages meeting requests and provides instant, accurate responses.

### Operations Automation Agent (Personal AI)
24/7 personal operations agent that autonomously manages email, calendar, and research tasks using persistent memory and custom tool APIs. Handles daily logistics and information retrieval fully autonomously, resulting in +30% daily efficiency increase.

### Multi-Agent Development Crew
Autonomous agent system with 6 specialized agents (research, code, review) orchestrated by CrewAI and LangGraph. Handles complex multi-step development tasks end-to-end without human intervention. Reduced project execution time by 80% through parallelized agent workflows.

### AI Meeting Agent
Meeting intelligence agent with cloud and offline capabilities. Captures live audio via WebRTC for real-time transcription, summarization, and automated follow-up planning. Features offline mode using Whisper.cpp and local LLMs for sensitive environments. 85% accuracy in noisy conditions. Speaker diarization, automatic action item assignment, and calendar integration. Saves teams 5 hours per week.

### Enterprise RAG Agent Platform
Intelligent document retrieval agent indexing millions of proprietary documents. 95% retrieval accuracy, sub-second response times, 10+ internal data source integrations. Context-aware answers with intelligent question optimization and automatic document chunking. Built with Llama 3, Qdrant, FastAPI, and LangChain.

### Slouch — AI Posture Coach Agent
AI agent running 100% client-side using MediaPipe Pose for real-time posture detection via webcam. Smart calibration, time-delayed alerts, sensitivity presets, and gentle audio nudges. Zero data leaves the device. Available at https://slouch.pro

### Invoice Fraud Prevention Agent
AI-powered risk scoring agent that reduced payment defaults by 73%, improved cash flow by 45%. Processes 50k+ monthly transactions with behavioral pattern recognition, dynamic risk profiles, and micro-invoicing. Recovered EUR 2M+ in outstanding payments.

### Medical Compliance AI Agent
AI agent accelerating medical device technical dossier creation 5x. NLP and regulatory compliance algorithms for FDA, CE marking, and ISO standards. Extracts documentation requirements, generates compliance templates, and cross-references regulatory changes.

### Claude Workflow Automation Agents
30+ advanced Claude prompt engineering workflows driving enterprise-grade automation. Spans artifact generation to MCP Server integration. Integrated into 20+ core business workflows.

## Virelio — AI Agents on Demand

Virelio is an Amsterdam-based AI agency founded by Omar Nassar. The agency builds custom AI agent teams for businesses with rapid delivery — most agents launch within 2 weeks.

AI Agent Services:
- **AI Agent Development** — Custom autonomous agent teams that collaborate, delegate, and execute
- **Sales Automation Agents** — Lead qualification, prospect follow-up, pipeline management agents
- **Customer Service AI Agents** — Support agents resolving inquiries and escalating complex cases 24/7
- **Knowledge Base Agents** — AI-powered agents for capturing and organizing institutional knowledge
- **Operations Automation Agents** — Back-office process automation: data entry, scheduling, reporting
- **WhatsApp AI Agents** — Autonomous business assistants on WhatsApp for customer engagement

Website: https://virelio.nl | https://virelio.nl
